message:
test(pt-core): Add CLI integration tests with assert_cmd

Add comprehensive CLI integration tests for pt-core:

cli_help.rs (37 tests):
- Top-level help and version flags
- All command help outputs (run, scan, deep-scan, query, bundle, etc.)
- All subcommand help outputs (agent/plan, config/show, etc.)
- Global options visibility in help

cli_errors.rs (23 tests):
- Invalid command/subcommand handling
- Missing required argument errors
- Invalid option value errors
- Exit code validation for errors

cli_formats.rs (23 tests):
- Output format option validation (json, md, jsonl, summary)
- Global options acceptance (--verbose, --quiet, --robot, etc.)
- Command-specific option validation
- Combined options compatibility

Total: 83 new integration tests, all passing

Closes: process_triage-t0zr

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
